item.description: PDCResults @PDCResults · 6min (R): European Tour 5 - European Darts Grand Prix 2026, Round 1, Karel Sedlacek (92.01) 5 (11) 6 (86.64) Valters Melderis 72

item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 8min DEBUT DELIGHT!
What a moment!
Valters Melderis stuns Karel Sedlacek in our opening game
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 8min DEBUT DELIGHT!
What a moment!
Valters Melderis stuns Karel Sedlacek in our opening game of the tournament, beating the Czechia number one 6-5 to win on his European Tour debut!
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 1 3 17 2 mil

item.title:

Gian van Veen admits he is
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 15min “This has been my level lately. It’s not Premier League-worthy.”
Gian van Veen admits he is struggling and concerned about his form following surgery.
Full story: https:// oche180.com/van-veen-frust rated-by-dip-in-form-following-surgery/ …

item.title: WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 15min The Lord Mayor of Sheffield has joined us to celebrate the #WorldChampionship staying in the city!
item.description: WST @WeAreWST · 15min The Lord Mayor of Sheffield has joined us to celebrate the #WorldChampionship staying in the city! 1 10 1 mil
